children.name: div
children.textContent: Rain band hits 72nd–86th St in 14 min

children.name: span
children.textContent: Exit on the west side — avoid the gust channel along 8th Ave.

children.name: span
children.textContent: Rain band crossing. Umbrella recommended or stay underground.

children.name: span
children.textContent: Rain ending. Stay on east side of Broadway — less puddles.
